items.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer — Personal & Open-Source Projects
bullets: Designed and shipped full-stack applications end to end: distributed backends (Node.js, Fastify, Spring Boot), React/TypeScript frontends, Docker & CI/CD
Built real-time systems (Socket.IO), event-driven microservices, and an AI-powered IoT monitoring platform (LSTM, Random Forest)
Preparing the ISTQB Foundation Level certification while applying test automation (Selenium, Postman, JUnit) across projects
